title: CSS: Responsive Grid System
input_format: A configuration object with columns, gap, and breakpoints
output_format: A function that generates CSS grid styles for a responsive grid system
example_input: createGrid({ columns: 12, gap: '16px', breakpoints: { sm: 640, md: 768, lg: 1024 } })
example_output: CSS string for a 12-column responsive grid
constraints: 1 <= columns <= 24, breakpoints must be valid pixel values
